auditMetadata.scope: WPF performance analysis focusing on startup time, UI responsiveness, and memory usage

issues.title: Constructor Synchronous Initialization in Page Views
issues.description: LandingPage, CoursePage, LessonPage, and CourseSidebar all perform synchronous DI dependency injection and UI initialization in their constructors. This blocks the UI thread during navigation.
issues.recommendation: Move heavy initialization to async Loaded event handlers. Use Lazy<T> for expensive dependencies. Consider async factory pattern for page creation.

issues.title: LessonPage Constructor Performs Heavy Synchronous Work
issues.description: LessonPage constructor initializes multiple services, creates new CourseSidebar instance, and performs immediate sidebar refresh all on UI thread before Loaded event.
issues.recommendation: Defer sidebar creation to Loaded event. Use virtualization for lesson content. Consider singleton sidebar pattern with content swapping instead of recreation.

issues.title: Memory Leak: LessonPage Event Handlers Never Unsubscribed
issues.description: Challenge controls (CodingChallenge, QuizChallenge, etc.) subscribe to ChallengeCompleted and ContextChanged events in LessonPage, but these event handlers are never unsubscribed when navigating away, causing memory leaks.
issues.recommendation: Implement IDisposable pattern for LessonPage. In Dispose(), iterate through _challengeControls and unsubscribe from all events. Also clear ContentPanel.Children.

issues.title: Memory Leak: CourseSidebar Lesson Buttons Dictionary Never Cleared
issues.description: CourseSidebar maintains a _lessonButtons dictionary that accumulates Button references every time LessonItem_Loaded fires. These are never removed, causing memory leaks during navigation.
issues.recommendation: Implement IDisposable and clear _lessonButtons on unload. Use WeakReference for button tracking, or implement proper cleanup in Unloaded event.

issues.title: ResourceDictionary Bloat: App.xaml Merges All Theme Dictionaries
issues.description: App.xaml merges all theme ResourceDictionaries at startup regardless of which are actually needed. This includes complex animation storyboards, gradient brushes, and control templates that may not all be used immediately.
issues.recommendation: Consider lazy-loading theme resources. Split Controls.xaml into smaller dictionaries loaded on demand. Use ResourceDictionary.ThemeDictionaries for conditional loading.

issues.title: ItemsControl Without Virtualization in LessonPage ContentPanel
issues.description: ContentPanel (StackPanel) loads all content sections and challenge controls synchronously without virtualization. For lessons with many sections, this creates UI freeze.
issues.recommendation: Replace StackPanel with VirtualizingStackPanel. Use DataTemplateSelector for different section types. Implement lazy loading for off-screen content.

issues.title: TutorChat ItemsControl Lacks Virtualization for Message History
issues.description: TutorChat uses ItemsControl inside a ScrollViewer for chat messages without virtualization. Long conversations will cause performance degradation.
issues.codeSnippet:
<ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" x:Name="MessagesScrollViewer" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" Padding="4">
    <ItemsControl x:Name="MessagesPanel">
        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
            <DataTemplate>
                <controls:ChatMessageBubble Message="{Binding}"/>
            </DataTemplate>
        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
    </ItemsControl>
</ScrollViewer>
issues.recommendation: Replace ItemsControl with ListBox using VirtualizingStackPanel. Implement message pagination or trimming for long conversations. Set VirtualizationMode to Recycling.

issues.title: AnimatedCard 3D Rendering Without Hardware Detection
issues.description: AnimatedCard uses Viewport3D with complex 3D transformations for all cards, even on systems without hardware acceleration. No fallback to simpler 2D rendering.
issues.codeSnippet:
<Viewport3D x:Name="CardViewport">
    <Viewport3D.Camera>
        <PerspectiveCamera x:Name="CardCamera" Position="0,0,1.1" .../>
    </Viewport3D.Camera>
    <!-- Complex 3D mesh and lighting -->
    <Viewport2DVisual3D x:Name="CardSurface">
        <Viewport2DVisual3D.Geometry>
            <MeshGeometry3D x:Name="CardMesh" .../>
        </Viewport2DVisual3D.Geometry>
    </Viewport2DVisual3D>
</Viewport3D>
issues.recommendation: Check PerformanceProfile.IsSoftwareRendering and disable 3D effects. Provide 2D fallback with simple scale transforms. Consider using CacheMode=BitmapCache for software rendering mode.

issues.title: Complex Multi-Binding in Staggered Animation Behavior
issues.description: AnimationBehaviors.AnimateItemsWithStagger uses reflection and multiple animations per item, firing for every ItemsControl item change. No throttling or debouncing.
issues.recommendation: Batch animations using Storyboard. Use CompositionTarget.Rendering for frame-synchronized updates. Limit staggered items to visible viewport only.

issues.title: LandingPage Creates Skeleton Cards Synchronously Before Data Load
issues.description: LandingPage creates 4 SkeletonCard controls synchronously in constructor before async data load begins, blocking UI thread unnecessarily.
issues.recommendation: Defer skeleton creation until after first layout pass. Use single placeholder instead of 4 separate controls. Consider using ItemsControl with ItemsSource binding for skeletons.

issues.title: CourseSidebar Recreates Entire Sidebar on Every Lesson Navigation
issues.description: Every lesson navigation creates a new CourseSidebar instance and calls SetSidebarContent, causing full visual tree reconstruction. No sidebar reuse.
issues.recommendation: Implement singleton sidebar pattern in MainWindow. Use content binding to switch course context instead of sidebar recreation. Cache sidebar per course.

issues.title: INotifyPropertyChanged Not Using Weak Event Pattern
issues.description: TutorMessage implements INotifyPropertyChanged but subscribers hold strong references. In long-running chat sessions, this can prevent garbage collection.
issues.recommendation: Consider using WeakEventManager for PropertyChanged events in long-lived message collections. Implement message history trimming.

issues.title: ConfettiOverlay Creates Particles Without Cleanup Verification
issues.description: ConfettiOverlay creates particle animations for achievement celebrations. No explicit cleanup of particle objects or animation storyboards after completion.
issues.recommendation: Implement proper particle cleanup after animation completion. Use Completed event to remove particles from visual tree. Pool particle objects for reuse.

issues.title: QuizChallenge and MultiQuizChallenge Create RadioButtons in Constructor
issues.description: Both quiz controls create all radio button UI elements synchronously in their constructors. For quizzes with many questions/options, this blocks UI thread.
issues.recommendation: Defer radio button creation until first visibility. Use virtualization for multi-question quizzes with many options. Consider async initialization pattern.

issues.title: DataTrigger on IsSoftwareRendering Evaluated Per Button Instance
issues.description: NeonPrimaryButton style uses DataTrigger binding to PerformanceProfile.IsSoftwareRendering for each button instance. Static value evaluated repeatedly.
issues.codeSnippet:
<DataTrigger Binding="{Binding Source={x:Static services:PerformanceProfile.IsSoftwareRendering}}" Value="True">
    <Setter TargetName="ButtonBorder" Property="Effect" Value="{x:Null}"/>
</DataTrigger>
issues.recommendation: Cache PerformanceProfile.IsSoftwareRendering value and use it to conditionally apply styles at application startup. Consider separate style dictionaries for hardware/software rendering.

issues.title: No Database Query Async/Await Pattern Verification
issues.description: ProgressService and CourseService methods use async/await, but LessonPage performs progress check synchronously in async void Loaded handler. Potential for UI thread blocking.
issues.recommendation: Ensure all database operations use ConfigureAwait(false). Move progress checks to background thread. Add cancellation token support for navigation interruptions.

issues.title: PulseBorderCard Uses Forever Repeating Animation on Loaded
issues.description: PulseBorderCard style triggers infinite rotation animation on every card Loaded event. Multiple cards on screen create multiple concurrent forever-animations.
issues.recommendation: Limit concurrent animations. Use Visibility-based trigger instead of Loaded. Consider reducing animation complexity when multiple pulse cards visible.

immediate: Implement IDisposable pattern for LessonPage to unsubscribe challenge events
Add VirtualizingStackPanel to ItemsControl in TutorChat and LessonPage
Cache CourseSidebar instance instead of recreating on each navigation
shortTerm: Defer AnimatedCard 3D effects until hardware acceleration confirmed
Split ResourceDictionary loading to be demand-based
Add message history limits to TutorChat
longTerm: Implement page pooling for LessonPage and CoursePage
